window_summary: This window tracks the recent appsmithorg/appsmith release stream from v1.72 through v2.1, covering weekly feature additions, bug fixes, security patches, and infrastructure upgrades including the major v2.0 release with MongoDB 7 and Java 25.

chunks.title: Release v1.72 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.72 🌈
Tag: v1.72; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-05-15T04:26:50Z; created_at: 2025-05-12T05:56:32Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Enhanced datasource structure retrieval logic in the `useTableOrSpreadsheet` hook (#40612)
- Added non-null check for published actions to prevent errors (#40598)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.72, the release note includes fixes: enhanced datasource structure retrieval logic in the useTableOrSpreadsheet hook, and added a non-null check for published actions to prevent errors.

chunks.title: Release v1.73 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.73 🌈
Tag: v1.73; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-05-22T06:10:45Z; created_at: 2025-05-21T14:26:04Z
Release notes:
### **Fixes**
- Logged out users automatically if their session has expired between page navigations. (#40718)
- Updated styles for the JS settings popover. (#40660)
- Improved offline data handling for data tables with infinite scroll enabled. (#40632)
- Refined table search by excluding system columns from search results. (#40647)
- Removed usage of the Google Shared Drive flag. (#40617)
- Resolved cyclic dependencies caused by run behavior changes in reactive queries. (#40481)
- Fixed unit test failures in `JSFunctionSettings`. (#40480)
---
### **Features**
- Added backend support for backwards compatibility in "execute on load" functionality. (#40644)
- Improved infinite scroll column merging in `TableWidgetV2`. (#40610)
- Replaced all frontend instances of `executeOnLoad` with `runBehavior`. (#40358)
- Replaced `executeOnLoad` with `runBehavior` in all action config settings. (#40339)
- Updated references across the codebase from `executeOnLoad` to `runBehaviour`. (#40361)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.73, the release note includes fixes such as automatically logging out users with expired sessions between page navigations, updating styles for the JS settings popover, improving offline data handling for infinite scroll data tables, refining table search by excluding system columns, removing the Google Shared Drive flag, and resolving cyclic dependencies from run behavior changes. Features include backend support for backwards compatibility in execute on load, improved infinite scroll column merging in TableWidgetV2, and replacing frontend instances of executeOnLoad with runBehavior across action config settings and codebase references.

chunks.title: Release v1.74 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.74 🌈
Tag: v1.74; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-05-28T03:04:26Z; created_at: 2025-05-26T06:19:32Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Eliminated a concurrency bug in the file deletion logic by removing side effects from parallel streams (#40744)
- Redirect users who are not part of an organization to the signup page (#40735)
- Refactored validation logic in `TableWidgetV2` to improve clarity and correctness (#40679)
- Added type checking for Mixpanel session recording methods (#40717)
- Logged out users if their session has expired between page switches (#40718)
- Enabled `runBehaviour` in published mode as well (#40722)
- Fixed email validation logic in `InputWidgetV2` (#40708)
- Prevented `NullPointerException` during `BearerTokenAuth` import (#40688)
- Ensured left-side auth content is shown when multi-org feature is enabled (#40687)
---
### Features
- Updated toast messages for actions triggered on page load (#40726)
- Implemented backend changes to support automatic `runBehaviour` updates (#40671)
- Introduced multi-organization login page (#40690)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.74, the release note includes fixes: eliminating a concurrency bug in file deletion logic, redirecting non-organization users to signup, refactoring TableWidgetV2 validation, adding type checking for Mixpanel session recording, logging out users with expired sessions between page switches, enabling runBehaviour in published mode, fixing email validation in InputWidgetV2, preventing NullPointerException during BearerTokenAuth import, and ensuring left-side auth content shows when multi-org is enabled. Features include updated toast messages for page load actions, backend changes for automatic runBehaviour updates, and a multi-organization login page.

chunks.title: Release v1.75 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.75 🌈
Tag: v1.75; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-04T04:17:54Z; created_at: 2025-06-02T07:01:53Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Fixed an issue where widgets disappeared when the page name contained parentheses (#40818)
- Updated CRUD action handling for `runBehaviour` generation (#40792)
- Prevented loading all workspaces into memory to improve performance (#40810)
- Handled burst traffic while fetching feature flags during scheduled cron jobs (#40808)
- Ensured explicitly marked automatic actions are included in layout load actions (#40778)
- Allowed application to run as a non-root user (#40642, #40793)
- Added missing `displayName` and `slug` fields to the organization reducer (#40779)
- Improved styling of full name input field to align with radio buttons (#40727)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.75, the release note includes fixes: resolving widget disappearance when page names contain parentheses, updating CRUD action handling for runBehaviour generation, preventing loading all workspaces into memory, handling burst traffic during feature flag cron jobs, ensuring explicitly marked automatic actions are included in layout load actions, allowing the application to run as a non-root user, adding missing displayName and slug fields to the organization reducer, and improving styling of the full name input field.

chunks.title: Release v1.76 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.76 🌈
Tag: v1.76; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-11T06:03:26Z; created_at: 2025-06-09T06:47:35Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Applied updates to the code editor for improved functionality (#40239)
- Switched Redis logic to use non-blocking `SCAN` command instead of `KEYS` to enhance performance (#40878)
- Added `nss_wrapper` support in the Helm chart for better compatibility (#40673)
- Handled undefined user object on the landing screen for invalid cloud billing domains (#40855)
- Ensured CRUD queries include `dynamicBindingPathList` for correct binding behavior (#40833)
- Fixed incorrect value display in table computed columns (#40664)
### Feature
- Enhanced error handling for responses from Cloud Services (#40821)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.76, the release note includes fixes: applying updates to the code editor, switching Redis logic to use non-blocking SCAN instead of KEYS, adding nss_wrapper support in the Helm chart, handling undefined user objects on the landing screen for invalid cloud billing domains, ensuring CRUD queries include dynamicBindingPathList, and fixing incorrect value display in table computed columns. A feature enhances error handling for responses from Cloud Services.

chunks.title: Release v1.77 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.77 🌈
Tag: v1.77; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-18T04:55:49Z; created_at: 2025-06-13T07:07:00Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Improved form login specification for better reliability (#40693)
- Enhanced null handling during action parameter evaluation and rendering (#40910)
- Reverted the debounce change applied to `onValueChange` in input widgets (#40922)
- Improved null safety in analytics data collection for action executions (#40905)
- Updated security context handling by using the reactive context repository instead of directly modifying session attributes (#40892)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.77, the release note includes fixes: improving form login specification, enhancing null handling during action parameter evaluation and rendering, reverting the debounce change on onValueChange in input widgets, improving null safety in analytics data collection for action executions, and updating security context handling by using the reactive context repository instead of directly modifying session attributes.

chunks.title: Release v1.78 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.78 🌈
Tag: v1.78; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-25T05:29:00Z; created_at: 2025-06-23T12:04:37Z
Release notes:
### Features
- Enabled organization fetching based on cloud billing status (#41016)
- Implemented generation of an empty meta widget to handle empty data scenarios gracefully (#40886)
- Added a multi-organization dropdown for easier organization switching (#40967)
- Introduced `instanceId` into distributed lock keys to ensure proper isolation across instances (#40966)
- Improved UI spacing and text truncation in the “Recent Domains” section for better readability (#40970)
- Added tracking support for domains in multi-organization setups (#40938)
---
### Fixes
- Upgraded TinyMCE to the latest MIT-licensed version (#41003)
- Suppressed the `ResizeObserver` loop runtime error in development when using `webpack-dev-server` (#40968)
- Resolved JSObject test failures after CRUD generation updates (#40954)
- Updated debugger assertion method to use `GetNAssertElementText` (#40937)
- Fixed various package upgrade issues and completed incremental upgrades (#40935, #40947)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.78, the release note includes features: enabling organization fetching based on cloud billing status, generating an empty meta widget for empty data scenarios, adding a multi-organization dropdown, introducing instanceId into distributed lock keys, improving UI spacing and text truncation in the Recent Domains section, and adding tracking support for domains in multi-organization setups. Fixes include upgrading TinyMCE to the latest MIT-licensed version, suppressing ResizeObserver loop runtime errors, resolving JSObject test failures after CRUD generation updates, updating debugger assertion method, and fixing various package upgrade issues.

chunks.title: Release v1.79 🌈

Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.79 🌈
Tag: v1.79; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-07-02T04:46:18Z; created_at: 2025-06-30T09:24:13Z
Release notes:
### Features
- Excluded `app.appsmith.com` from recent domains tracking to reduce unnecessary entries (#41059)
### Fixes
- Fixed client build failure on EE by updating utility logic (#41058)
- Refined the function used to detect reactive cyclic dependencies for better evaluation stability (#41049)
- Removed incorrect API parameter dependency updates in evaluations to prevent reactivity issues (#41019)
- Adjusted `deploy_preview.sh` by updating the cluster name and improving kubeconfig handling (#40981)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.79, the release note includes a feature: excluding app.appsmith.com from recent domains tracking. Fixes include: fixing client build failure on EE, refining the function to detect reactive cyclic dependencies, removing incorrect API parameter dependency updates, and adjusting deploy_preview.sh by updating the cluster name and improving kubeconfig handling.

chunks.title: Release v1.84 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.84 🌈
Tag: v1.84; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-08-06T06:03:57Z; created_at: 2025-08-04T07:22:50Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Skipped evaluation of JSObjects when the path points to a function, improving performance and avoiding unnecessary computation (#41157)
- Applied a security patch addressing issue #425 (#41152)
- Implemented an additional security fix to strengthen system integrity (#41149)
- Updated the app editor logo to use the favicon, aligning with overall branding (#41147)
- Refined reactive action logic to resolve cyclic dependency issues, especially with app templates and the database-driven "Generate Page" flow (#41144)
- Improved app libraries path matching to ensure accurate checks during evaluation (#41139)
- Corrected column position validation logic in the Table V2 freeze column test to ensure proper functionality (#41130)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.84, the release note includes fixes: skipping evaluation of JSObjects when the path points to a function, applying a security patch addressing issue #425, implementing an additional security fix, updating the app editor logo to use the favicon, refining reactive action logic to resolve cyclic dependency issues especially with app templates and the database-driven Generate Page flow, improving app libraries path matching, and correcting column position validation logic in the Table V2 freeze column test.

chunks.title: Release v1.86 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.86 🌈
Tag: v1.86; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-24T05:35:57Z; created_at: 2025-09-22T08:46:29Z
Release notes:
### Fixes
- Resolved multiple **security vulnerabilities**:
- CVE-2024-38821 *(PRs #41221, #41188)*
- CVE-2025-48734 *(PR #41223)*
**Note**: With this recent upgrade of the **Spring Security** library, the handling of Google authentication has been impacted. Since Google auth is integrated through Spring Security, configurations which allow **multiple domains** for the sign up/sign in flow are currently resulting in errors during authentication.
- Ensured `responseMeta` is added to query objects **even when the query fails**. *(PR #41216)*
- Added **`.docx` file type support** to binary handling. *(PR #41200)*
- Fixed **extra spacing issues** in pages with a **Fixed Height container** by removing redundant code. *(PR #41178)*
- Temporarily switched to **Bitnami legacy images** for stability. *(PR #41176)*
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.86, the release note includes fixes: resolving multiple security vulnerabilities CVE-2024-38821 and CVE-2025-48734, noting that the Spring Security upgrade impacts Google authentication for multiple domains; ensuring responseMeta is added to query objects even when the query fails; adding .docx file type support to binary handling; fixing extra spacing issues in pages with a Fixed Height container; and temporarily switching to Bitnami legacy images for stability.

chunks.title: Release v1.88 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.88 🌈
Tag: v1.88; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-08T06:26:08Z; created_at: 2025-10-06T07:33:41Z
Release notes:
### Features
- Added support for **listing function versions and aliases** in the AWS Lambda Plugin. *(PR #41263)*
- Backend enhancement: **Applications and workspaces are now sorted alphabetically**. *(PR #41253)*
- Added an **account suspension error message** to improve clarity when rate limiting is triggered. *(PR #41254)*
---
### Fixes
- Cleaned up **logs** for better maintenance. *(PR #41275)*
- Fixed an issue where **recreating DP failed** due to network restrictions. *(PR #41264)*
- OAuth2: Ensured **single-valued `hd` parameter** for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.3.13+. *(PR #41271)*
- Fixed **tab navigation issues** in Fixed Layout caused by event listener timing. *(PR #41256)*
- Updated logic to **avoid interfering with DSL** when infinite scroll is enabled. *(PR #41217)*
- Fixed **ad-hoc image generation step** during build. *(PR #41262)*
- Corrected **Bitnami image hardcoding** in init container definition. *(PR #41257)*
- Added **Content-MD5 header** for Object Lock compliance. *(PR #41241)*
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.88, the release note includes features: adding support for listing function versions and aliases in the AWS Lambda Plugin, sorting applications and workspaces alphabetically, and adding an account suspension error message for rate limiting. Fixes include cleaning up logs, fixing recreation of DP failure due to network restrictions, ensuring single-valued hd parameter for OAuth2 compatibility with Spring Boot 3.3.13+, fixing tab navigation issues in Fixed Layout, updating logic to avoid interfering with DSL when infinite scroll is enabled, fixing ad-hoc image generation step during build, correcting Bitnami image hardcoding in init container definition, and adding Content-MD5 header for Object Lock compliance.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.89, the release note includes fixes: resolving download failures for Hurl due to upstream changes, and addressing security vulnerabilities CVE-2025-9288 and CVE-2025-9287 in the sha.js and cipher-base libraries.

chunks.title: Release v1.93 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.93 🌈
Tag: v1.93; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-04T13:06:43Z; created_at: 2025-12-04T07:48:16Z
Release notes:
## **Features**
- Static URL Support for Applications and Pages. (#41312)
- Added support for Custom GraphQL Actions for integrations using GraphQL. (#41404)
- Added formatting for GraphQL body in the query editor. (#41425)
- Added a `setValue` method for the Radio Group widget. (#41402)
- Enabled specifying deployments in the Helm chart without requiring autoscaling. (#41397)
## **Fixes**
- Simplified the `isChecked` update logic by removing unnecessary parameters. (#41430)
- Improved authentication by validating the `Origin` header against `APPSMITH_BASE_URL`. (#41426)
- Corrected placeholder text in the GraphQL action editor. (#41423)
- Resolved an issue where partial exports of custom libraries resulted in zero libraries being exported. (#41416)
- Updated Gemini model options in the Google AI datasource to ensure compatibility with the `generate` command. (#41415)
- Made the horizontal scrollbar thicker for better visibility in tables. (#41370)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.93, the release note includes features: static URL support for applications and pages, support for custom GraphQL actions for integrations using GraphQL, formatting for GraphQL body in the query editor, a setValue method for the Radio Group widget, and enabling specifying deployments in the Helm chart without requiring autoscaling. Fixes include simplifying isChecked update logic, improving authentication by validating the Origin header against APPSMITH_BASE_URL, correcting placeholder text in the GraphQL action editor, resolving partial exports of custom libraries resulting in zero libraries exported, updating Gemini model options in the Google AI datasource, and making the horizontal scrollbar thicker for better visibility in tables.

## **Features**

- Displayed workspace logos in the sidebar navigation. (#41377)
## **Fixes**
- Fixed an issue where `git pull` created a sync commit, resulting in lost changes. (#41467)
- Updated Helm charts to support deployments with zero replicas. (#41444)
- Temporarily disabled the `precompressed` directive. (#41365)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.94, the release note includes features: adding a Redeploy button to sync the latest changes to App view mode, and displaying workspace logos in the sidebar navigation. Fixes include fixing an issue where git pull created a sync commit resulting in lost changes, updating Helm charts to support deployments with zero replicas, and temporarily disabling the precompressed directive.

chunks.title: Release v1.95 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.95 🌈
Tag: v1.95; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-22T06:08:52Z; created_at: 2026-01-20T13:23:04Z
Release notes:
### Features
- Added `extraVolumes` and `extraVolumeMounts` configuration options to the Helm chart. (#41515)
- Show a **security warning message** when `ps` is turned off. (#41486)
- Display user **display names** on workspace members page (#8545)
---
### Fixes
- Fixed an issue where **anonymous users could execute unpublished actions**. (#41517)
- Updated Helm charts to use the **Appsmith-built MongoDB image** by default. (#41506)
- Switched to **OIDC trust for depot** in the base image workflow. (#41497)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.95, the release note includes features: adding extraVolumes and extraVolumeMounts configuration options to the Helm chart, showing a security warning message when ps is turned off, and displaying user display names on the workspace members page. Fixes include fixing an issue where anonymous users could execute unpublished actions, updating Helm charts to use the Appsmith-built MongoDB image by default, and switching to OIDC trust for depot in the base image workflow.

chunks.title: Release v1.96 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.96 🌈
Tag: v1.96; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-19T04:25:22Z; created_at: 2026-02-17T06:46:04Z
Release notes:
### Features
- Added **Betterbugs SDK support**. (#41532)
- Added a **Tooltip property** for the Checkbox widget. (#41483)
---
### Fixes
- Fixed an **arbitrary file write vulnerability** that allowed writes outside the repository scope. (#41565)
- Added a `getTextFromHTML` fallback and normalized search keys to properly handle HTML content. (#41553)
- Fixed an **XSS vulnerability** in Table HTML cells. (#41539)
- Closed InputStreams after `StreamUtils.copyToString` to prevent resource leaks. (#41516)
- Fixed an issue where stale actions could not read contents. (#41533)
- Updated MongoDB **feature compatibility version (FCV)** to 6. (#41534)
- Fixed an **OS command injection vulnerability** when in-memory Git is enabled. (#41525)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.96, the release note includes features: adding Betterbugs SDK support, and adding a Tooltip property for the Checkbox widget. Fixes include fixing an arbitrary file write vulnerability, adding a getTextFromHTML fallback and normalizing search keys, fixing an XSS vulnerability in Table HTML cells, closing InputStreams after StreamUtils.copyToString, fixing an issue where stale actions could not read contents, updating MongoDB feature compatibility version to 6, and fixing an OS command injection vulnerability when in-memory Git is enabled.

chunks.title: Release v1.97 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.97 🌈
Tag: v1.97; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-05T05:51:15Z; created_at: 2026-03-02T06:46:44Z
Release notes:
### Features
- Enabled **on-the-fly response compression in Caddy**. (#41577)
- Added **BetterBugs recording links** with support for air-gapped environments and disable options. (#41576)
- Introduced **Favorite Applications (V2)**. (#41555)
- Added new style properties to **TableWidgetV2**: `headerRowColor`, `oddRowColor`, and `evenRowColor`. (#41551)
---
### Fixes
- Stabilized the **app deletion flow** to prevent resource spikes and server restarts. (#41584)
- Moved the **cookie `sameSite` initializer** to the constructor to prevent an `OverflowError`. (#41575)
- Prevented **open redirects** in login and OAuth2 redirect flows. (#41550)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.97, the release note includes features: enabling on-the-fly response compression in Caddy, adding BetterBugs recording links with support for air-gapped environments and disable options, introducing Favorite Applications (V2), and adding new style properties to TableWidgetV2: headerRowColor, oddRowColor, and evenRowColor. Fixes include stabilizing the app deletion flow, moving the cookie sameSite initializer to the constructor to prevent an OverflowError, and preventing open redirects in login and OAuth2 redirect flows.

chunks.title: Release v1.98 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.98 🌈
Tag: v1.98; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-03-23T10:52:20Z; created_at: 2026-03-19T17:52:51Z
Release notes:
## Features
- Added **TLS (SSL mode) support** for the Redis datasource in both the backend and datasource UI. (#41587)
## Fixes
- Enforced **edit permissions** for application snapshot deletion. (GHSA-g2hc-wmw2-32jr) (#41624)
- Added a **red asterisk** to required fields. (#41609)
- Prevented **unauthenticated disclosure of instance metadata**. [APP-14994] (#41598)
- Prevented **SQL injection** in UQI filter service `projection` and `sortBy` columns. (#41594)
- Restricted **draft action execution** to editors only. (#41614)
- Upgraded `simple-git` to `3.32.3` to resolve **critical CVE-2026-28292**. (#41613)
- Upgraded `fast-xml-parser` to `4.5.4` to resolve **critical CVE-2026-25896**. (#41595)
- Increased the **client class API timeout** for the consolidated API from **20 seconds to 60 seconds**. (#41591)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.98, the release note includes a feature: adding TLS (SSL mode) support for the Redis datasource in both the backend and datasource UI. Fixes include enforcing edit permissions for application snapshot deletion, adding a red asterisk to required fields, preventing unauthenticated disclosure of instance metadata, preventing SQL injection in UQI filter service projection and sortBy columns, restricting draft action execution to editors only, upgrading simple-git to 3.32.3 to resolve critical CVE-2026-28292, upgrading fast-xml-parser to 4.5.4 to resolve critical CVE-2026-25896, and increasing the client class API timeout for the consolidated API from 20 seconds to 60 seconds.

chunks.title: Release v1.99 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v1.99 🌈
Tag: v1.99; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-16T07:07:29Z; created_at: 2026-04-14T08:47:46Z
Release notes:
## Fixes
- Prevented imports from corrupting published `layoutOnLoadActions`. (#41737)
- Prevented **automatic semicolon insertion (ASI)** in `wrapCode` from causing refactoring failures. (#41727)
- Removed an extra `nfs` field from the `persistentVolume` object. (#41724)
- Updated **BetterBugs recording links** to use the new package URLs. (#41667)
- Replaced **PAT** with `GITHUB_TOKEN` in the `cleanup-dp` workflow. (#41699)
- Fixed styling issues with **scrollbar select widgets**. (#41656)
- Prevented a **super user creation race condition**. (GHSA-9wcp-79g5-5c3c) (#41681)
- Blocked **SSRF** via `send-test-email` SMTP host validation. (GHSA-vvxf-f8q9-86gh) (#41666)
- Fixed **critical CVE-2025-70952**. (#41673)
- Upgraded `handlebars` to `4.7.9` to resolve **CVE-2026-33937**. (#41672)
- Mitigated **CVE-2026-22732**, where Spring Security HTTP headers were not being written. (#41669)
- Fixed an issue where datasource queries did not fail when the **`createdAt` field** was missing. (#41665)
- Normalized user emails on save to remove **invisible Unicode characters**. (#41664)
- Enforced **ACL permission checks** in OAuth2 callback datasource lookup. (GHSA-rg2x-4v4h-g78w) (#41640)
- Validated the **filter temp table name** before `DROP TABLE`. (#41642)
- Prevented **AQL injection** in the ArangoDB plugin caused by unsafe string concatenation. (#41641)
- Expanded the **metadata denylist** to strengthen SSRF protection. (GHSA-9m89-5jw7-q5cr) (#41643)
- Hardened **admin environment value escaping**. (#41637)
- Sanitized URLs in **ManualUpgrades** to prevent reflected XSS. (#41636)
- Enforced **edit permissions** for application snapshot deletion. (GHSA-g2hc-wmw2-32jr) (#41624)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v1.99, the release note includes fixes: preventing imports from corrupting published layoutOnLoadActions, preventing automatic semicolon insertion in wrapCode from causing refactoring failures, removing an extra nfs field from the persistentVolume object, updating BetterBugs recording links to use new package URLs, replacing PAT with GITHUB_TOKEN in the cleanup-dp workflow, fixing styling issues with scrollbar select widgets, preventing a super user creation race condition, blocking SSRF via send-test-email SMTP host validation, fixing critical CVE-2025-70952, upgrading handlebars to 4.7.9 to resolve CVE-2026-33937, mitigating CVE-2026-22732 where Spring Security HTTP headers were not being written, fixing an issue where datasource queries did not fail when the createdAt field was missing, normalizing user emails on save to remove invisible Unicode characters, enforcing ACL permission checks in OAuth2 callback datasource lookup, validating the filter temp table name before DROP TABLE, preventing AQL injection in the ArangoDB plugin, expanding the metadata denylist to strengthen SSRF protection, hardening admin environment value escaping, sanitizing URLs in ManualUpgrades to prevent reflected XSS, and enforcing edit permissions for application snapshot deletion.

chunks.title: Release v2.0 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v2.0 🌈
Tag: v2.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-21T12:47:30Z; created_at: 2026-05-20T12:32:10Z
Release notes:
<aside>
⚠️
# **Important / Critical - DO NOT UPGRADE WITHOUT READING**
If you are upgrading from a version earlier than v**1.96**, you **must first upgrade to version v1.99 before upgrading to 2.0+**.
This requirement is especially important for instances using the built-in MongoDB. Appsmith 2.0 bundles MongoDB 7, and versions v1.96 through v1.99 include the required migration changes needed to support this upgrade path.
Skipping this intermediate upgrade will cause the upgrade to 2.0+ to fail, including installations using an external MongoDB instance. Completing this step is required for all deployments.
If you already attempted the upgrade and encountered a failure, no data loss or destructive changes will occur. Simply upgrade to version v1.99 first. Once the instance is successfully running on v1.99, you can proceed with upgrading to 2.0+.
For detailed upgrade instructions, see:
https://docs.appsmith.com/getting-started/setup/instance-management/update-appsmith
</aside>
## Features
- Added a **documentation link tooltip** for the Appsmith Base URL setting and implemented trailing-slash normalization. (#41782)
- Added support for the **MongoDB Operator** in Helm deployments. (#41733)
- Added **Ask AI CE stubs** and shared file wiring support. (#41692)
---
## Fixes
- Validated request origins before persisting invited users. [APP-15239] (#41826)
- Preserved **Redis credentials** during `appsmithctl restore`. (#41827)
- Upgraded `postgresql-jdbc` to `42.7.11` to remediate **CVE-2026-42198**. (#41812)
- Added validation for **Git repository URLs**. (#41819)
- Prevented **unauthenticated access** to full OpenAPI documentation. (GHSA-v6jh-fx3m-7xhw) (#41803)
- Fixed a **path traversal vulnerability**. (GHSA-m4hv-9p7g-56vm) (#41790)
- Upgraded `arangodb-java-driver` to `7.25.0` to remediate **CVE-2025-52999**. (#41789)
- Replaced generic *“Response not valid”* messages with more actionable error messages for improved observability. (#41769)
- Failed closed for token-bearing emails when `APPSMITH_BASE_URL` is unset. (GHSA-j9gf-vw2f-9hrw) (#41767)
- Updated Helm charts to use documented image values instead of the undocumented `_image` key. (#41765)
- Fixed a datasource configuration leak in Appsmith App Viewer imports. (GHSA-93mf-9h52-gfxp) (#41764)
- Prevented **stored XSS** via SQL autocomplete. (GHSA-vjfq-fvfc-3vjw) (#41760)
- Stripped identity fields from imported JSON before persistence. (#41761)
- Prevented HTML entity decoding from corrupting binary file uploads in multipart form data. (#41742)
- Pinned `protobufjs` to `^7.5.5` to address **GHSA-xq3m-2v4x-88gg**. (#41745)
- Upgraded `axios` to `1.15.0` to address **GHSA-3p68-rc4w-qgx5**. (#41739)
- Upgraded bundled Mongo to 7.x
- Upgraded backend JAVA to 25.x
- Upgraded backed Node to 24.x
- Upgraded bundled MongoDB to 7.x
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v2.0, the release note includes an important upgrade notice: users upgrading from versions earlier than v1.96 must first upgrade to v1.99 before upgrading to v2.0+, because v2.0 bundles MongoDB 7 and requires migration changes from v1.96 through v1.99. Features include adding a documentation link tooltip for the Appsmith Base URL setting with trailing-slash normalization, adding support for the MongoDB Operator in Helm deployments, and adding Ask AI CE stubs and shared file wiring support. Fixes include validating request origins before persisting invited users, preserving Redis credentials during appsmithctl restore, upgrading postgresql-jdbc to 42.7.11 to remediate CVE-2026-42198, adding validation for Git repository URLs, preventing unauthenticated access to full OpenAPI documentation, fixing a path traversal vulnerability, upgrading arangodb-java-driver to 7.25.0 to remediate CVE-2025-52999, replacing generic error messages with more actionable ones, failing closed for token-bearing emails when APPSMITH_BASE_URL is unset, updating Helm charts to use documented image values, fixing a datasource configuration leak in Appsmith App Viewer imports, preventing stored XSS via SQL autocomplete, stripping identity fields from imported JSON before persistence, preventing HTML entity decoding from corrupting binary file uploads, pinning protobufjs to ^7.5.5 to address GHSA-xq3m-2v4x-88gg, upgrading axios to 1.15.0 to address GHSA-3p68-rc4w-qgx5, upgrading bundled Mongo to 7.x, upgrading backend JAVA to 25.x, upgrading backend Node to 24.x, and upgrading bundled MongoDB to 7.x.

chunks.title: Release v2.1 🌈
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: appsmithorg/appsmith
Release: Release v2.1 🌈
Tag: v2.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-29T11:36:01Z; created_at: 2026-05-28T07:04:32Z
Release notes:
## Features
- Replaced **Intercom** with **Pylon** across the platform. (#41722)
- Added `memory-analysis.sh` to help with **memory sizing and diagnostic analysis**. (#41816)
---
## Fixes
- Applied a comprehensive **non-routable IP address filter** on WebClient to strengthen SSRF protection. (GHSA-v49v-673j-g4vj, GHSA-m23h-pvf3-2m7p) (#41849)
- Built MongoDB database tools from source using patched `x/crypto` and `x/net` dependencies. (#41850)
- Restricted the **Caddy admin interface** to a local socket. (GHSA-8jvv-gwqg-6vjc) (#41847)
- Added **path traversal validation** to widget save paths. (GHSA-r553-q33m-v7pf) (#41834)
- Removed the unused **Supervisord admin port**. (GHSA-v49v-673j-g4vj) (#41837)
- Updated the Husky pre-commit hook to correctly stage server files from the worktree root. (#41835)
- Added a **non-root user** to the Cypress snapshot Dockerfile. (#41823)
- Enforced `MANAGE_PAGES` permission checks when updating the dependency map. (GHSA-q4p7-j55w-5mjm) (#41828)
- Updated Helm charts to allow **numeric CPU values** in `resources.requests`. (#41824)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release v2.1, the release note includes features: replacing Intercom with Pylon across the platform, and adding memory-analysis.sh to help with memory sizing and diagnostic analysis. Fixes include applying a comprehensive non-routable IP address filter on WebClient to strengthen SSRF protection, building MongoDB database tools from source using patched x/crypto and x/net dependencies, restricting the Caddy admin interface to a local socket, adding path traversal validation to widget save paths, removing the unused Supervisord admin port, updating the Husky pre-commit hook to correctly stage server files from the worktree root, adding a non-root user to the Cypress snapshot Dockerfile, enforcing MANAGE_PAGES permission checks when updating the dependency map, and updating Helm charts to allow numeric CPU values in resources.requests.

questions.query_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith releases, which release introduces a multi-organization login page?
Across the appsmithorg/appsmith releases, how does the handling of user sessions differ between v1.73 and v1.74?

options.text: v1.73 logs out users with expired sessions between page navigations, while v1.74 logs out users with expired sessions between page switches.
v1.73 introduces multi-organization login, while v1.74 removes session expiration entirely.
Both releases handle session expiration identically by redirecting to the signup page.
v1.73 adds a non-null check for published actions, while v1.74 adds type checking for Mixpanel session recording.

questions.expected_answer: v1.73 logs out users with expired sessions between page navigations, while v1.74 logs out users with expired sessions between page switches.

answer_support.answer_text: Logged out users automatically if their session has expired between page navigations.
Logged out users if their session has expired between page switches

questions.query_text: In the appsmithorg/appsmith release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds a premium feature tag for paid external SaaS plugins in the Data Side Pane, (2) a release that introduces a multi-organization login page, (3) a release that adds an upgrade button to the editor header for easier plan upgrades, (4) a release that adds a Redeploy button to sync the latest changes to App view mode.

answer_support.answer_text: Add premium feature tag for paid external SaaS plugins in the Data Side Pane
Added an upgrade button to the editor header for easier access to plan upgrades
Added a Redeploy button to allow users to sync the latest changes to App view mode
